stimulus: In recent decades, statisticians across Europe have developed new indicators that capture aspects of public welfare. Officials in Norway, for instance, rely on a Better Life Index. This indicator ______blank household income, environmental quality, and personal satisfaction.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice B is correct. The convention being tested is subject-verb agreement together with appropriate tense. The singular present tense verb “tracks” agrees with the singular subject “this indicator” and is consistent with the present tense established earlier.

Choice A uses a plural verb form that doesn’t agree with the singular subject. Choices C and D use past or conditional tenses that don’t match the present time frame.
